login.title: Sign in
login.firstAccount: No accounts yet — the first one becomes the administrator.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitleTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.subtitleRecovery: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved.
mfa.useRecovery: Lost your phone? Use a recovery code

register.title: Create an account
register.firstAccount: This is the first account on this instance — it will be the administrator.
register.closedBody: This instance is not accepting new accounts. Ask an administrator to create one for you.
